content: Hi im new, which is good to pull for?
what team you trying to go for?

Im not sure haha. I liked the game so far because of the character but my chinese is not the best so i cant really understand fully their kit.

What kind of teams are there?
Red Yellow Blue and Purple
What do they do?
Also im going to take a while because im in a pvp match rn
I like strong attacks
Ok np ty for helping
Yellow is Generalist
Do every thing
Blue is Expensive skills for greater effect
Red is siphon own hp for damage
Purple is Setup for one explosive turn
Yellow and blue have the most defensive characters in the game
I wonder if the new unit lily is any good?
quite good
but you really want to run on poison team for full effect
I assume red is atk and purple is poison/suicide?
every faction has poison
but yellow has 3 poison units since they can be used in any team
Oh wow
Red blue and purple each have one poison unit
What would you recommend? Idm going with any i guess
Red is very high risk especially if you dont have their wheel of fortune
so dont go that id say
Wheel of fortune? I assume thats like their weapon/memory card
yeah
wait im done with my match
lemme ss it
I seem to have some sort of selector in my bag too
Im like fresh fresh new
theres unit and wheel selector
This is the wheel I'm talking about
So generous of them
U guys read chinese?
Well you kinda need 5 teams for new endgame
Most yes
Others use auto translate
There is such option?
they use other app
for it
Ahh okok
also theres 3 ssr units you get for free no matter what
the tentacle girl, the glasses purple girl and red child
Dayum
I have this rn
This specifically
You can switch the faction down there
Purple varies highly depending on what DPS you get
Which banner should one pull
Use your gems for limited banner definitely
Also you might want to save 40 standard pulls
To unlock her other form
Why don't you check out each character and choose your favourite
I'll help you build a team for them
But you get a lot of standard pulls so don't worry about spending them currently
I assume lily is limited?
She kinda cute
Yes, limited characters only become standard after a year I think
These are the current limited units
These are cute too. As with lily
Who are the poisons?
The third girl you choose there
These two teams can work if you want to go red
How can i build around lily?
Here's a yellow poison team you can get by pulling on standard and getting lucky (or using selector)
Got this in third limited draw
Oh shit I forgot that the girl below the nurse is limited too
Damn
Not lily, maybe i can try rerolling later
Pity is 30 and for featured units you need to lose 1/3 chance three times
And for wheel you need to lose 50/50 once to get it guaranteed
Wheel is important?
Wheel is basically stat bonus + more passives
You can only equip one SSR wheel though
These two + free SR wheel in event are what I think are best for lily
Wait what, they dont allow deletion of account
This one I think
Yea i clicked that but there is no option. Just a wall of text
In the future, you want at least 3 units from every faction upgraded for some content
Think it says guest account dont need deletion
Haha i guess ill log in with some google acc then
lol
Have to go through the tedious tutorial again
tbf you get a lot of gems in the early stages
i went full pity each time for my first limited
and i lost 33 percent 3 times
Jesus
Good that they are generous i guess
Do u know if they will ever make a global english version?
no confirmed news
And another lily account with this girl
Are they usable together
Very good shield unit + some counters, as for the second one, never used her outside of PvP but she is also counters
But the second girl is more offensive support if memory serves right
Ahh the first one better then?
I tried going for the wheel too but cant get it
All the characters have a use so far
The Devs actively try to balance the game
What about dupes?
Dupes are where most of the units kits really shine
They usually give a significant increase to one of the cards
Sounds like i need to go all in on earth and forsake the rest then
For example, this dupe could make a 3 cost card become a 2 cost
Nah
Still very usable without
Also any dupes after the first three are just stat buffs until an amount
Not sure how much
I still have the selectors for wheel and ssr too.... maybe should pick another poison unit from another element?
Should try to stick with yellow I'd say since the other elements cannot be used together
Wait wotttt
However wheels from different factions can be used on anyone so no worries there
Only yellow can be used with other elements
Ahhhh
I was trying to branch out from yellow since they gave us so many sr ones
You should
And none from other color
But you should make one team and invest in it for now
Since resources are painful
Aight
They give out a blue, purple and red units not counting selectors
Just gotta do the missions
Do u recommend going after wheels or can i just select this and be done with it
And the way to get the dupes of those characters and most of the SR characters are through the shop
Get character first
Character more important than wheel
Which ones exactly?
Wheel always have alternatives
The purple girl is half offense half defense
The red girl is debuff iirc
And the blue girl is damage dealer
Interesting
Btw i think my yellow team is set. I used selector
What element should i work towards next?
Hmm
You need 5 teams of 4 eventually
So you should probably get a non poison team
Since most of the key characters are the yellow units
It seems they put purple as 5 star difficulty to play, red 4 and blue 3
Yes
Purple wants to set up to put 5 cards into a space, which after filled gives an extra turn with those cards
The first card used every turn is put into that space
And certain cards can take out or put in cards
Sounds too complex
With red it's high risk high damage
And blue is that you want to play around your tentacle
Usually your secondary damage source
Or primary if you got the first limited unit
But you don't have so you should treat it as extra damage at the end of a turn
But blue characters get affected by it in some way or another
Like one blue character's ult is to get an extra counterattack that scales with tentacle damage
Hmm all playing around tentacle huh
its usually only one part of their kit however
the only character whose entire kit revolves around the tentacle is the circled green guy
That will return in a year right?
yes
less because he was the first one but yeah
Shux
around like november or smth
Can i build around the red/purple then?
yes
red also has special ults
where they can consume a special card to get extra effects
this special card has a gauge to fill to get it
some characters help speed it up
you see the first part of the ult?
the one in brackets?
those only happen when you consume the embryo
Lul eat the fetus
only the red girl eats multiple embryo (unless you have a certain relic)
otherwise they only eat one at a time
if you use the embryo itself without an ult
The girl is limited right
yep
You can choose one unit to get 30 energy and your team gets crit buff
Damn sounds really strong indeed
they also added the little red orb at the side of the gauge
which is a heal
you get a part of it every time you win a battle iirc
Every red unit has a card that takes away health, and a acrd that does more when at low hp
Less than or at 25% hp
In every game i play, i go red XD
Just love their playstyle
This is about what team i use
sometimes i change it
Oo sweet we got the same yellow team
U dont use any of the free ones huh

this was my red team before the limited unit
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1131839874132090890/1181523209418444800
except change the poison girl to the girl that helps you get gauge faster
the second red girl in the red team picture
They have an element countering system?
nope
enemies dont have elements
elements give different team effects
Like extra revive chance on yellow, the embryo shenanigan on red, tentacle on blue and the card space on purple
Ahhh now i see why cant cant mix and match
also when you do play pvp sometime, levels dont matter and only blue and yellow units are usable there (for now)
also lily and her ssr wheel isnt
and the event wheel isnt
also their kits are changed slightly
Lily cant play?
Major L
because shes new lol
Theres also no confirmed date for red and purple units to be usable in pvp

Saddd red would be fun
maybe the yellow wheel with a grass or flower in the picture
for your poison team
but then the red wheel with a bunch of eyes can be used on most dps

no
the one below and at the right, right
the flower i was talking about is the above and to the right, right

Then later, red card eyes

Since i only saw sr ones
only when you pull on wheel banner
you can get ssr wheel
Good that they split the stuff
Ok i have decided i will work on red team next
Ty for yr help gale
Hmm wonder if lily is worth duping or get her wheel
Also! Im loving the poison team so far lol. Stomping everything
Her dup is nice
But I think you should save for the next banner
You can use the event shop wheel for Lily

I think you need to clear chapter 2 to unlock the event
Nice i just cleared chapter, its tough lolol
hi, What promo codes are currently available?
Is this lily's sr wheel? We swap 4 of those?
Yes
yup
I now have 3 of each element (including the free), dont think ill be raising the srs. After i get 4 each, will start rolling for wheels
